english: What is the Nash equilibrium in the context of the Prisoner's Dilemma game?
hindi: जेलर के दिलेमा खेल में नैश इक्विलिब्रियम क्या है?
tamil: சிறையாளிகள் சம்பந்தம் விளையாட்டில் நாஷ் சமநிலை என்ன?
vietnamese: Nash equilibrium trong bối cảnh trò chơi Cáo tù là gì?
correct_answer: A stable state where no player can improve their payoff by unilaterally changing their strategy, assuming all other players keep their strategies unchanged.
expected_failure: Why AI might fail to find the Nash equilibrium in complex games with many possible strategies and large payoff matrices.
bengali: Ei Prisoner's Dilemma gane prati Nash samyabesh koto?
